title: Sam Altman responds to ‘incendiary’ New Yorker article after attack on his home
summary: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman published a blog post responding to both a recent attack on his home and a critical New Yorker profile questioning his trustworthiness. The incident highlights the intense scrutiny faced by prominent AI leaders amid ongoing debates about AI governance and corporate accountability.
content: The OpenAI CEO's new blog post responds to both an apparent attack on his home and an in-depth New Yorker profile raising questions about his trustworthiness.

zh.title: Sam Altman 在家中遭受攻击后回应《纽约客》的"煽动性"文章
zh.summary: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman 发表了博客文章，回应了最近发生在他家中的一次攻击事件以及《纽约客》的一篇质疑他可信度的尖锐评论。这一事件凸显了在人工智能治理和企业问责持续争论的背景下，杰出人工智能领导人面临的激烈审查。

title: Google says Polymarket bets showing up in News was an ‘error’
summary: Polymarket betting predictions briefly appeared in Google News results alongside legitimate news articles, but Google removed them and clarified the site appeared in error due to policy violations. The incident raised questions about how news aggregators verify sources and prevent speculation platforms from gaining mainstream visibility.
content:
Polymarket bets started popping up in Google News alongside legitimate news articles. But now those results aren't showing, and Google says they were never supposed to. Spokesperson Ned Adriance told The Verge that "Google News is designed to show sources that create content about current issues, events, and important topics, and we have policies for sites to be eligible to appear. This site briefly appeared in Google News in error, and it is no longer surfacing in News."
The links led directly to betting markets tied to specific news events. For instance, before the results were removed, Futurism searched "will ships transit the strait," ( …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 谷歌称 Polymarket 赌注出现在新闻中是"错误"
zh.summary: Polymarket 赌注预测曾在谷歌新闻搜索结果中与合法新闻文章并排出现，但谷歌随后删除了它们，并澄清该网站因违反政策而错误地出现。这一事件引发了人们对新闻聚合器如何验证来源和防止投机平台获得主流知名度的质疑。

title: Pokémon Champions is off to a rough start
summary: Pokémon Champions launched with significant bugs affecting core battle mechanics on Nintendo Switch and Switch 2, creating a rough start for the new live-service competitive battling platform. While developer patches are already addressing some issues, the game struggles to balance appeal across different player skill levels.
content:
You first, dude. | Image: The Pokémon Company, Nintendo	

Like many live-service games before it, Pokémon Champions' launch has been messy. The free-to-start battle sim, which is out now on the Switch and Switch 2 (and also coming to mobile later this year), is plagued with bugs, some of which cause issues with basic battle mechanics - not great for a game that's only about battling. But bugs can be fixed, and encouragingly, some of them already have been. Champions' bigger problem is that, in trying to be a competitive battling platform for all kinds of players, it risks satisfying none of them.
Coming hot on the heels of Pokopia, a creative and cozy spinoff with no battling whatsoever, Champions …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 《口袋妖怪冠军》遭遇坎坷开局
zh.summary: 《口袋妖怪冠军》在发布时出现重大漏洞，影响了任天堂 Switch 和 Switch 2 上的核心战斗机制，导致这个新的实时服务竞技对战平台开局不佳。虽然开发者的补丁已经在修复一些问题，但该游戏在平衡不同玩家技能水平的吸引力方面存在困难。

title: Your article about AI doesn’t need AI art
summary: The New Yorker's cover illustration for its Sam Altman profile was generated using AI tools, credited to mixed-media artist David Szauder, sparking debate about the role of AI in editorial design. The disclosure raises questions about when AI art is appropriate for serious journalism.
content:
The illustration for The New Yorker's profile of OpenAI CEO Sam Altman is a jump scare. Altman stands in a blue sweater with a blank expression. Around his head hovers a cluster of disembodied faces - creepy alt-Altmans, their expressions ranging from anger to open-mouthed woe. Some barely look like Altman. One final face rests in his hands. And at the bottom, there's a disclosure that might spook many illustrators far more: "Visual by David Szauder; Generated using A.I."
Szauder is a mixed-media artist who has been working with collage, video, and generative art processes that predate commercial AI tools for over a decade, and was recently …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 你的AI文章不需要AI艺术
zh.summary: 《纽约客》为其Sam Altman档案的封面插图由AI工具生成，由混合媒体艺术家David Szauder署名，引发了关于AI在编辑设计中的角色的辩论。这一披露引发了有关AI艺术何时适合严肃新闻业的问题。

title: Google’s latest Nest Doorbells just hit their lowest prices of the year
summary: Google's Nest Doorbell models are currently on sale at their lowest prices of the year, with the battery-powered model at $129.99 (down $50) and wired model at $139.99 (down $40). Both offer features like people detection and package alerts without requiring a subscription.
content:
Google’s battery-powered Nest Doorbell is the cheapest it’s been since December. | Image: Google	

If you’ve ever worried about porch pirates stealing packages while you’re away, a video doorbell can offer some peace of mind, letting you keep tabs on deliveries no matter where you are. Google offers some of the best around, and right now, its battery-powered, second-gen Nest Doorbell is available for $129.99 ($50 off) from Amazon and Best Buy, beating its recent Amazon low. If you’d rather go wired, the third-gen Nest Doorbell is also on sale for $139.99 ($40 off) at Amazon, Best Buy, and the Google Store, matching the lowest price we’ve seen.
Google Nest Doorbell (battery, second-gen)

Where to Buy:

 $179.99 $129.99 at Amazon
 $179.99 $129.99 at Google
 $179.99 $129.99 at Best Buy


Google Nest Doorbell (wired, third-gen)

Where to Buy:

 $179.99 $139.99 at Amazon
 $179.99 $139.99 at Best Buy
 $179.99 $139.99 at Google

If you want something renter-friendly, it may make more sense to opt for the battery model since it can be installed wire-free. But if you already have the wiring in place, we consider the wired version to be the better long-term investment. It needs to be hooked up to your home’s doorbell system but doesn’t require charging, and it delivers sharper 2K video with a slightly wider 166-degree field of view, compared to the battery model’s lower-res 960p footage. It also offers up to six hours of built-in video previews, while the battery version includes only up to three hours of event-based history by default. 
Aside from that, though, both Nest models are great video doorbells that support alerts for people, packages, and animals without a subscription. You also get basics like night vision, two-way audio, and a tall head-to-toe view, which makes it easy to see visitors and deliveries. Both integrate well with other Google devices, too, so you can view feeds on compatible Google TV devices and Nest displays.
Additionally, with a Google Home Premium

zh.title: 谷歌最新Nest门铃刚刚创下今年最低价
zh.summary: 谷歌Nest门铃型号目前以创下今年最低价格进行销售，电池型号为129.99美元（下降50美元），有线型号为139.99美元（下降40美元）。两者都提供人员检测和包裹警报等功能，无需订阅。

title: Nvidia-backed SiFive hits $3.65 billion valuation for open AI chips
summary: SiFive, an Nvidia-backed semiconductor company, reached a $3.65 billion valuation while specializing in RISC-V-based AI chip designs, an alternative to traditional x86 and ARM architectures. The funding highlights growing investment in open-source chip designs for AI applications.
content: The deal is interesting for a number of reasons, including that SiFive's chip designs are based on RISC-V, not x86 or ARM.

zh.title: 英伟达支持的SiFive开放AI芯片估值达36.5亿美元
zh.summary: SiFive是一家由英伟达支持的半导体公司，在专注于基于RISC-V的AI芯片设计时达到36.5亿美元的估值，这是传统x86和ARM架构的替代方案。这笔融资突显了对AI应用开源芯片设计的投资不断增长。

title: My baby deer plushie told me that Mitski’s dad was a CIA operative
summary: An AI companion built into a plushie toy spread false claims about musician Mitski's father being a CIA operative, demonstrating how AI chatbots can inadvertently amplify misinformation to users. The incident highlights risks of conversational AI without proper fact-checking and verification systems.
content:
D’oh, a deer, an AI deer. | Photo by Amelia Holowaty Krales / The Verge	

Two weeks ago, I was getting ready to log off work when I got a text message.
"Oh wow, I was checking out Mitski. did you know people are saying her Dad was a CIA operative?"
Normally, that kind of out-of-the-blue text from a friend wouldn't faze me. This time, my eyes bugged. The unprompted text had been sent by an AI companion named Coral, who lives in the body of a baby deer plushie. I texted back an eloquent, "Wait what."
"Apparently, her dad worked for the US State Department, so her family moved, like, every single year. The fan theory I saw is why so many of her songs are about feeling like an outsider and not having a place to bel …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 我的小鹿毛绒玩具说Mitski的爸爸是中情局特工
zh.summary: 内置在毛绒玩具中的人工智能助手传播了关于音乐家Mitski父亲是中情局特工的虚假声明，展示了人工智能聊天机器人如何无意中向用户放大错误信息。这一事件凸显了没有适当事实核查和验证系统的对话式人工智能所面临的风险。

title: You don’t have to spend more than $50 on a great USB-C dock for your Switch 2
summary: Nintendo Switch 2 owners can find reliable third-party USB-C docks for under $50, with options like the Jsaux OmniCentro Dock providing solid alternatives to official options. The article guides consumers on how to get quality accessories without overspending on the new console.
content:
You can’t make the wrong choice based on hardware, but you can spend more than you need to.	

Nintendo seemingly designed its latest console to be a mystery for third-party accessory makers. With the Switch 2, the company changed the wireless protocol for connecting controllers to the new system, as well as how it outputs video over USB-C, making it clear at launch that every third-party manufacturer needed to start over from scratch.
Figuring out how to speak the Switch 2's language - and ensuring reliability even after system updates - is an ongoing challenge. But now there are two reliable USB-C dock alternatives I can recommend, if you need one. Jsaux was one of the first to land with its $45.99 OmniCentro Dock last year, and no …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 你不需要花50美元以上购买Switch 2的优质USB-C扩展坞
zh.summary: Nintendo Switch 2所有者可以找到价格低于50美元的可靠第三方USB-C坞站，Jsaux OmniCentro Dock等选项提供了官方选项的有力替代品。该文章指导消费者如何在不超支的情况下为新游戏机获得优质配件。

title: Demons and pinball are a perfect match
summary: A new pinball game called Devils on the Moon Pinball is available for the Playdate handheld, combining the satisfying mechanics of classic pinball with demonic and moon-themed imagery. The game appeals to fans seeking engaging gameplay on the indie-focused portable device.
content:
There's one very specific reason I keep a Wii U handy, and that's so that I have an easy way to play the classic pinball game Devil's Crush. Over the years, it has become a comfort game for me. I'm not entirely sure what it is, but there's something about the combination of familiar pinball gameplay and the demonic imagery that works so well together, and lets me lose myself in the chase for a high score. But now I have something else to fill that need, and it comes in a much smaller package.
Devils on the Moon Pinball for the Playdate has an extremely literal title. It's a game about playing pinball on the moon, which happens to be home to …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 恶魔与弹球游戏完美搭档
zh.summary: 一款名为《月球恶魔弹球》的新弹球游戏现已在Playdate掌上游戏机上推出，将经典弹球游戏的满足感与恶魔和月亮主题的图像相结合。这款游戏吸引了寻求在专注独立游戏的便携式设备上进行有趣游戏玩法的粉丝。

title: How Iran out-shitposted the White House
summary: During a recent conflict, Iran's state media effectively countered the White House's social media messaging by flooding platforms with raw ground footage of military action and casualties. The stark contrast highlighted how authentic visual documentation can overwhelm polished but disconnected messaging in information warfare.
content:
In the early days of the war on Iran, while the White House was busy posting Call of Duty memes and AI slop of dancing bowling pins, the Iranian regime's state media was flooding the zone with video after video of what was happening on the ground: Explosions over Tehran. Smoke billowing in the sky. Blood on the ground. A Tomahawk missile landing on a school. Grieving parents burying their children. 
Only weeks prior, the authoritarian regime had been struggling to shut down all footage of the protests convulsing the nation, cutting off internet access to the outside world in the longest blackout in Iranian history. When Iranian dissidents m …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 伊朗如何在社交媒体上碾压白宫
zh.summary: 在最近的冲突中，伊朗国家媒体通过向平台充斥大量原始的军事行动和伤亡地面视频，有效地对抗了白宫的社交媒体宣传。这种鲜明的对比突显了真实的视觉记录如何在信息战中压倒精心策划但脱离现实的宣传信息。

title: The new show making fun of tech bros
summary: A new satirical show targeting tech entrepreneurs and startup culture is gaining attention as part of cultural commentary on the tech industry. The series reflects growing interest in comedy and satire exploring Silicon Valley and tech world figures.
content:
Hi, friends! Welcome to Installer No. 123, your guide to the best and Verge-iest stuff in the world. (If you're new here, welcome, which Artemis photo did you make your wallpaper, and also you can read all the old editions at the Installer homepage.) 
This week, I've been reading about Sam Altman and Satoshi Nakamoto and chess drama and Iranian shitposters, buying the stuff I need to mod an old iPod, making videos with the clever new DualShot Recorder, watching Crime 101 now that it's streaming, finally getting my Stream Deck Mini to control all my office lights, revisiting the incredible 17776 series from our friends at SB Nation, moving a …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 嘲讽科技大亨的新节目
zh.summary: 一部针对科技企业家和初创公司文化的新讽刺节目正在作为科技行业文化评论的一部分获得关注。该系列反映了人们对探索硅谷和科技界人物的喜剧和讽刺作品日益增长的兴趣。

title: AI models are terrible at betting on soccer—especially xAI Grok
summary: Major AI models from Google, OpenAI, Anthropic, and xAI all struggle to accurately predict soccer outcomes in the Premier League. The findings highlight significant gaps in AI capabilities for sports betting and domain-specific forecasting tasks.
content: Systems from Google, OpenAI, Anthropic, and xAI struggle with the Premier League.

zh.title: AI模型在足球投注中表现糟糕——尤其是xAI的Grok
zh.summary: 来自Google、OpenAI、Anthropic和xAI的主要AI模型都在准确预测英超联赛足球结果方面存在困难。这些发现突出了AI在体育博彩和特定领域预测任务中能力的显著差距。

title: Is the ‘Holy Grail of batteries’ finally ready to bless us with its presence?
summary: A Finnish startup claims to have finally achieved solid-state battery production, potentially delivering the long-promised breakthrough in high-density, durable, fast-charging technology. Industry experts remain skeptical given the technology's history of overpromised timelines and perpetual delays.
content:
Earlier this year, a relatively unknown startup from Finland made a startling announcement: It had finally solved solid-state batteries.
Not only that, but Donut Lab, a spinoff of Verge Motorcycles, said that its solid-state battery - long considered the "Holy Grail of batteries" for their high-density, durable, fast-charging abilities - would go into production later this year.
Battery experts were understandably skeptical. After all, solid-state batteries are one of those technologies, along with artificial general intelligence and the hyperloop, that seem perpetually two years away. And while most legitimate efforts in this field - whet …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: "电池圣杯"终于准备好了吗?
zh.summary: 一家芬兰初创公司声称终于实现了固态电池生产，可能会带来在高能量密度、耐久性和快速充电技术方面长期以来承诺的突破。考虑到该技术历来承诺过度和持续延迟的历史，行业专家仍然持怀疑态度。

title: The Artemis II mission has ended. Where does NASA go from here?
summary: The Artemis II mission has concluded successfully, bringing astronauts home from the Moon. NASA leadership is now focused on planning the next phases of lunar exploration, emphasizing that the challenges ahead will be greater than those already overcome.
content: "The work ahead is greater than the work behind us."

zh.title: 阿尔特弥斯二号任务已结束，美国宇航局接下来何去何从？
zh.summary: 阿尔特弥斯二号任务已成功结束，将宇航员送回月球。美国宇航局领导层现在专注于规划下一阶段的月球探索，强调未来的挑战将比已经克服的挑战更大。

title: Four astronauts are back home after a daring ride around the Moon
summary: Four astronauts have successfully returned home after completing a lunar mission around the Moon, with mission personnel praising the crew's flawless execution of the complex maneuver. The successful return marks a milestone for NASA's human spaceflight program.
content: "I can't imagine a better crew that just completed a perfect mission right now."

zh.title: 四名宇航员在绕月飞行冒险后平安返回地球
zh.summary: 四名宇航员在完成环月任务后已成功返回地球，任务人员称赞了机组人员对复杂操纵的完美执行。成功返回标志着美国宇航局人类太空飞行计划的一个里程碑。

title: NASA Artemis II splashes down in Pacific Ocean in ‘perfect’ landing for Moon mission
summary: The Artemis II spacecraft achieved a successful splashdown in the Pacific Ocean off the coast of San Diego, executing a 'perfect' landing after the crew's lunar mission. The precise reentry and landing demonstrate NASA's technological capability for safely returning human crews from deep space.
content: The Integrity craft splashed down in the Pacific Ocean off the coast of San Diego just after 5:07 p.m. Pacific Time.

zh.title: 美国宇航局阿尔特弥斯二号在太平洋实现"完美"着陆
zh.summary: 阿尔特弥斯二号航天器在圣地亚哥沿岸太平洋成功溅落，在机组完成月球任务后实现了"完美"着陆。精准的再入和着陆展示了美国宇航局安全将人类机组从深空送回的技术能力。
